name: AccountsController:listAccounts
description: Returns the list of all internal accounts in the wallet.

name: NetworkController:getState
description: Returns the current network controller state including chain configuration.

name: NetworkController:getNetworkClientById
description: Returns a network client instance for the given network client ID.

name: PreferencesController:getState
description: Returns the current user preferences state.

name: SignatureController:newUnsignedMessage
description: Initiates a new unsigned message signing request. Returns the message ID.

name: TokensController:getState
description: Returns the current tokens controller state including tracked tokens.
